headline: Dispatcher codegen — grouped-bash/read-guard now source generated lib/dispatcher-*.sh

bullets: grouped-bash-guard and grouped-read-guard now source generated lib/dispatcher-*.sh files (CHECK_SPECS + sourcing loop). Runtime behavior identical — same checks, same order, same block reasons. Two new files ship: lib/dispatcher-grouped-bash-guard.sh and lib/dispatcher-grouped-read-guard.sh.
